calendarNotes:
Guilford County Schools begins the 2025-2026 school year on August 25, 2025, and the school year ends June 10, 2026. Spring Break runs March 30–April 3, 2026. GCS and Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools share the same August 25 start date, but their spring breaks do not overlap: CMS breaks April 6–10, one full week after GCS wraps up. Families with children in both districts, or those coordinating childcare and travel across the two systems, will find no common break window in 2025-2026 — pick one district's week and plan around it.

Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools breaks significantly earlier in spring 2025-2026: WSFC spring break runs March 9–13, three full weeks before GCS begins its March 30 break. The gap between the two districts changes from year to year and should not be assumed to align. Families in GCS with relatives or friends attending WSFC schools should verify WSFC's official calendar before booking any shared spring travel, as the Piedmont Triad's three major school systems — GCS, WSFC, and Alamance-Burlington — each set spring break independently.

Thanksgiving break in 2025-2026 runs Wednesday through Friday, November 26–28. Students attend school through Tuesday, November 25, and return Monday, December 1. The three-day closure means the week immediately following — December 1–5 — is a standard five-day school week before the longer stretch toward winter break begins December 22.
